name: on-bright
description: On-Bright is a leading analog and mixed-signal IC design company specializing in power management solutions including AC-DC converters, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and battery management ICs.
longDescription: On-Bright Electronics, founded in 2004 and headquartered in Shanghai, China, is a premier fabless semiconductor company focused on analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. The company specializes in power management ICs including AC-DC converters, DC-DC converters, LED lighting drivers, and battery management solutions. With strong R&D capabilities and extensive patent portfolio, On-Bright serves customers across consumer electronics, industrial, automotive, and lighting markets. Their products are known for high efficiency, reliability, and cost-effectiveness, making them popular choices for power supply designs worldwide.

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: Offline power supply controllers and converters for various applications

coreProducts.name: DC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: Buck, boost, and buck-boost converters for point-of-load power conversion

coreProducts.name: LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: LED lighting drivers for general lighting and backlight applications

coreProducts.name: Battery Management
coreProducts.description: Battery charging and protection ICs for lithium-ion and other chemistries

advantages: Leading Chinese analog IC design company with strong power management expertise
Comprehensive portfolio covering AC-DC, DC-DC, LED drivers, and battery management
High-efficiency designs with competitive cost-performance ratio
Strong local technical support and fast response in China market
Extensive patent portfolio in power management and analog circuit design

faqs.question: What power management products does On-Bright offer?
faqs.answer: On-Bright offers a comprehensive range of power management ICs including AC-DC converters for offline power supplies, DC-DC buck/boost converters for point-of-load regulation, LED drivers for lighting applications, and battery management ICs for charging and protection. Their products cover power ranges from milliwatts to hundreds of watts, serving consumer electronics, industrial, automotive, and lighting markets with high-efficiency, cost-effective solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose On-Bright for cost-sensitive power supply designs requiring high efficiency and reliable performance with strong local support in China.

faqs.question: How does On-Bright compare to international power IC vendors like TI or ON Semiconductor?
faqs.answer: On-Bright offers competitive alternatives to international vendors like Texas Instruments and ON Semiconductor in the mid-range power management market. While they may not have the broadest portfolio, On-Bright excels in specific application areas with optimized, cost-effective solutions. Their AC-DC controllers and LED drivers are particularly competitive, offering comparable performance at significantly lower cost. On-Bright also provides faster local support and shorter lead times for customers in China and Asia.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider On-Bright for cost-optimized designs where their specific product offerings meet your requirements; evaluate international vendors for specialized or high-reliability applications.

faqs.question: What design tools and resources are available for On-Bright products?
faqs.answer: On-Bright provides comprehensive design support including detailed datasheets, application notes, reference designs, and evaluation boards. Their website offers design calculators for selecting external components, simulation models for popular SPICE tools, and PCB layout guidelines. Technical support is available through their FAE team and authorized distributors like BeiLuo Electronics. They also provide sample quantities for evaluation purposes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Utilize reference designs as starting points for your designs; contact FAE support for complex or custom requirements.

faqs.question: Does On-Bright provide technical support and field application engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, On-Bright maintains a strong technical support team including field application engineers (FAEs) who can assist with design reviews, troubleshooting, and optimization. Through authorized distributors like BeiLuo Electronics, customers have access to local FAE support for schematic review, PCB layout guidance, and debugging assistance. On-Bright also conducts regular technical training sessions for customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Engage with FAE support early in the design cycle for best results, especially for complex power supply designs.

faqs.question: What are the key features of On-Bright AC-DC converters?
faqs.answer: On-Bright AC-DC converters feature high integration, reducing external component count and BOM cost. Key features include quasi-resonant or CCM/DCM flyback operation for high efficiency, built-in high-voltage power MOSFETs, comprehensive protection features (OVP, OCP, OTP), and low standby power consumption meeting international standards. Their controllers support various topologies including flyback, buck, and PFC pre-regulators for applications from 5W to 150W.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select On-Bright AC-DC controllers for cost-sensitive adapter and power supply designs requiring high efficiency and low standby power.

faqs.question: Are On-Bright LED drivers suitable for general lighting applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, On-Bright offers a comprehensive portfolio of LED drivers suitable for general lighting applications including bulb lights, downlights, panel lights, and street lights. Their LED drivers support both isolated and non-isolated topologies, with features like high power factor correction (PFC), low total harmonic distortion (THD), and precise current regulation. Products range from low-power MR16 drivers to high-power street lighting solutions up to 100W.
faqs.decisionGuide: Specify On-Bright LED drivers based on power level, topology preference (isolated/non-isolated), and dimming requirements.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for On-Bright products?
faqs.answer: On-Bright maintains good inventory levels for popular power management ICs with typical lead times of 4-8 weeks for production quantities. Standard products are often available from stock or with short lead times. For high-volume orders or specific package requirements, contact BeiLuo Electronics for current availability and delivery scheduling. We can also arrange buffer stock for critical production requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Plan procurement with standard lead times; contact us for expedited delivery or long-term supply agreements.
